'''鈭歯g-m-v''' ('''kangamav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:righten|righten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:righten|righten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| kangamav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingamav|thingamav]] || [[word:jingamav|jingamav]] || [[word:shingamav|shingamav]] || [[word:kingamav|kingamav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungamav|thuthungamav]] || [[word:jujungamav|jujungamav]] || [[word:shushungamav|shushungamav]] || [[word:kukungamav|kukungamav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungamav|thungamav]] || [[word:jungamav|jungamav]] || [[word:shungamav|shungamav]] || [[word:kungamav|kungamav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungamav|thungamav]] || [[word:jungamav|jungamav]] || [[word:shungamav|shungamav]] || [[word:kungamav|kungamav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengamav|thengamav]] || [[word:jengamav|jengamav]] || [[word:shengamav|shengamav]] || [[word:kengamav|kengamav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongamav|thothongamav]] || [[word:jojongamav|jojongamav]] || [[word:shoshongamav|shoshongamav]] || [[word:kokongamav|kokongamav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongamav|thongamav]] || [[word:jongamav|jongamav]] || [[word:shongamav|shongamav]] || [[word:kongamav|kongamav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongamav|thongamav]] || [[word:jongamav|jongamav]] || [[word:shongamav|shongamav]] || [[word:kongamav|kongamav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngamav|th忙ngamav]] || [[word:j忙ngamav|j忙ngamav]] || [[word:sh忙ngamav|sh忙ngamav]] || [[word:k忙ngamav|k忙ngamav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangamav|thathangamav]] || [[word:jajangamav|jajangamav]] || [[word:shashangamav|shashangamav]] || [[word:kakangamav|kakangamav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangamav|thangamav]] || [[word:jangamav|jangamav]] || [[word:shangamav|shangamav]] || [[word:kangamav|kangamav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangamav|thangamav]] || [[word:jangamav|jangamav]] || [[word:shangamav|shangamav]] || [[word:kangamav|kangamav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangamav|shangamav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangamav|goshangamav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangamav|gokishangamav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangamavn眉|shangamavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangamavnkn眉|goshangamavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamavn眉|gokishangamavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangamavsh毛|shangamavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangamavnksh毛|goshangamavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangamavsh毛|gokishangamavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamavro|shangamavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamavnkro|goshangamavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamavro|gokishangamavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamavmu|shangamavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamavnkmu|goshangamavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamavmu|gokishangamavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangamavsher|shangamavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangamavnksher|goshangamavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangamavsher|gokishangamavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangamavng|shangamavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangamavnkng|goshangamavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangamavng|gokishangamavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangamavya|shangamavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangamavnkya|goshangamavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangamavya|gokishangamavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangamavyam|shangamavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangamavnkyam|goshangamavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangamavyam|gokishangamavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamavn眉sh毛|shangamavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamavnkn眉sh毛|goshangamavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamavn眉sh毛|gokishangamavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamavn眉ro|shangamavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamavnkn眉ro|goshangamavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamavn眉ro|gokishangamavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamavn眉mu|shangamavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamavnkn眉mu|goshangamavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamavn眉mu|gokishangamavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamavsh毛n眉|shangamavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamavnksh毛n眉|goshangamavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamavsh毛n眉|gokishangamavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamavsh毛ro|shangamavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamavnksh毛ro|goshangamavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamavsh毛ro|gokishangamavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamavsh毛mu|shangamavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamavnksh毛mu|goshangamavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamavsh毛mu|gokishangamavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamavron眉|shangamavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamavnkron眉|goshangamavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamavron眉|gokishangamavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamavrosh毛|shangamavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamavnkrosh毛|goshangamavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamavrosh毛|gokishangamavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamavromu|shangamavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamavnkromu|goshangamavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamavromu|gokishangamavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamavmun眉|shangamavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamavnkmun眉|goshangamavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamavmun眉|gokishangamavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamavmush毛|shangamavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamavnkmush毛|goshangamavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamavmush毛|gokishangamavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamavmuro|shangamavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamavnkmuro|goshangamavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamavmuro|gokishangamavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
